mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in RSAFS signals strengthening household demand and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value is 526057.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns, with Rank IC below 0.03 in more than half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A FEDFUNDS crossing above 2.0% during an upward rate path raises equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value is 2.04 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS crossings above 2.0% are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of historical walk-forward instances.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE is below 4% and PAYEMS keeps rising while FEDFUNDS is rising, labor-market tightness signals overheating and policy pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE < 4.0% and PAYEMS 3-month change > 0 and FEDFUNDS 3-month change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value is 3.5 as of t-1mo
regime_hint: late-cycle tightening with tight labor markets
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction signal has nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 returns below baseline in fewer than 50% of rolling 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in INDPRO signals stronger real production and operating leverage, raising expected earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value is 109.9206 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO growth fails to predict above-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns, with hit rate at or below 50% across walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A large decline in HOUST signals weakening housing demand and tighter credit-sensitive activity, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value is 1364.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakdown triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of instances or if average triggered returns exceed unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation momentum decelerates while FEDFUNDS remains above 2%, expected policy pressure eases and discount-rate risk falls, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation crosses below its 12-month inflation rate while FEDFUNDS > 2.0%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value is 256.358 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint disinflation-and-FEDFUNDS trigger does not deliver higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than unconditional returns with p-value below 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE from a low level signals deteriorating labor demand and rising recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value is 3.5 as of t-1mo
regime_hint: turning point from full employment to slowdown
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-rise triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward instances or if downside returns are not worse than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth and RSAFS growth are both positive, broad real activity and consumer spending reinforce earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter change > 0 and RSAFS 3-month change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value is 19021.86 as of t-6mo
regime_hint: mid-cycle expansion with positive demand momentum
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-demand signal has a 5-day forward S&P 500 hit rate at or below 50% and an average return no higher than the unconditional average.
